title: Arkangel Marketing v2.0 - ICP Definition & Growth Strategy
summary: Deep discovery session focused on defining Ideal Customer Profiles (ICPs) for LATAM and USA markets. Laura Ortiz leads USA sales with a $4M annual target against a current ACV of $1.7M, supported by a 12-person team handling tickets from $60K to $480K. A critical gap was identified in the marketing team, which currently consists of only one executor (Lucho), requiring an expansion of 3 new hires and the implementation of a conversion ladder framework with lead magnets to hit short-term ($1.3M in 3 months) and long-term ($5M by year-end) revenue goals.

discussion_points.description: Defined the $4M annual sales target for USA with a current ACV of $1.7M. Ticket sizes range from $60K to $480K across a 12-person team. Short-term goal is $1.3M in 3 months, long-term $5M by year-end.
Current marketing team is severely understaffed with only Lucho, who is an executor rather than a strategist. Plan to add 3 new team members and shift from execution mode to strategy mode.
Proposed implementing a conversion ladder framework with lead magnets to systematically move prospects through the funnel. Emphasis on Founder-led Growth and dedicated content production.

discussion_points.topic: ICP Definition for LATAM and USA
discussion_points.description: Detailed identification and definition of Ideal Customer Profiles for both Latin American and US markets to improve targeting and conversion rates.
Current database includes 15,000 contacts plus 100,000 doctors. Each SDR schedules 30-40 appointments weekly, establishing the outreach baseline for pipeline calculations.
Need to document marketing Standard Operating Procedures, develop buyer personas per market, and establish a regular content production cadence.

action_items.description: Lead USA sales operations targeting $4M annual revenue
Develop buyer personas for each target market (LATAM and USA)
Plan and establish regular content calendar
Evaluate current team competencies and identify gaps

decisions: Transition from execution mode to strategy mode for the marketing function
Implement a conversion ladder framework with lead magnets as the core growth engine
Adopt Founder-led Growth as a key marketing channel
Expand the marketing team by 3 new hires to support growth targets
Laura Ortiz will lead USA sales with a $4M target
next_steps: Implement marketing structure focused on Founder-led Growth and content production
Build conversion ladder to achieve $1.3M revenue in the next 3 months
Begin hiring process for 3 additional marketing team members
Develop and document buyer personas for LATAM and USA markets

diagrams.title: Marketing Conversion Ladder Framework
diagrams.mermaid_code:
flowchart TD
    A["Target Audience\n15K Contacts + 100K Doctors"] --> B["Lead Magnets\nContent & Resources"]
    B --> C["Lead Capture\nEmail & Landing Pages"]
    C --> D["Lead Nurturing\nFounder-led Content"]
    D --> E["SDR Outreach\n30-40 Appointments/Week"]
    E --> F{"Qualification"}
    F -->|"Qualified"| G["Sales Meeting"]
    F -->|"Not Ready"| D
    G --> H["Proposal\n$60K - $480K Tickets"]
    H --> I["Closed Deal"]
    I --> J["Revenue Targets\n$1.3M 3-Month / $5M Annual"]

    style A fill:#1565C0,color:#fff
    style B fill:#1976D2,color:#fff
    style C fill:#1E88E5,color:#fff
    style D fill:#2196F3,color:#fff
    style E fill:#42A5F5,color:#fff
    style F fill:#FF9800,color:#fff
    style G fill:#66BB6A,color:#fff
    style H fill:#43A047,color:#fff
    style I fill:#2E7D32,color:#fff
    style J fill:#1B5E20,color:#fff

diagrams.title: Sales Pipeline and Revenue Flow

flowchart LR

        M1["Lucho\nContent Executor"]
        M2["+3 New Hires"]
        M3["Founder-led Growth"]
    end

    subgraph OUTREACH["SDR Outreach"]
        S1["Database\n15K Contacts"]
        S2["Doctors DB\n100K Records"]
        S3["30-40 Meetings/Week"]
    end

    subgraph SALES["USA Sales - Laura Ortiz"]
        V1["ACV $1.7M"]
        V2["12 Person Team"]
        V3["$60K-$480K Tickets"]

    subgraph TARGETS["Revenue Targets"]
        T1["Q1: $1.3M"]
        T2["Annual: $5M"]

    MARKETING --> OUTREACH
    OUTREACH --> SALES
    SALES --> TARGETS

    style MARKETING fill:#E3F2FD,stroke:#1565C0
    style OUTREACH fill:#E8F5E9,stroke:#2E7D32
    style SALES fill:#FFF3E0,stroke:#E65100
    style TARGETS fill:#F3E5F5,stroke:#6A1B9A
